seo.title: Pool Financing | Maxima Pools - Columbus, OH
seo.description: Affordable fiberglass pool financing through Lyon Financial. Loans up to $250K, terms up to 30 years, fast approvals. Make your dream pool a reality with Maxima Pools.
seo.ogDescription: Affordable pool financing with industry-leading rates through Lyon Financial. Loans up to $250K with terms up to 30 years.

hero.subtitle: Your backyard paradise doesn't have to wait. Through our partnership with Lyon Financial — America's #1 pool financing company for over 40 years — you can get low rates, flexible terms up to 30 years, and loans up to $250K.

partner.paragraphLead: Lyon Financial has been America's most trusted pool financing company since 1979. With over
partner.paragraphTail: and specialized expertise in swimming pool loans, they make the financing process as refreshing as the pool itself.

benefitsSection.intro: Industry-leading terms designed to make your pool project accessible and completely stress-free.

benefits.title: Lowest Rates & Longest Terms
benefits.text: Industry-leading affordability with competitive rates and repayment terms stretching up to 30 years — keeping your monthly payments comfortable.

benefits.title: Flexible Loan Programs
benefits.text: Multiple options designed for different needs and project sizes. Whether it's a compact spa or a full backyard transformation, there's a program for you.

benefits.title: Dedicated Account Manager
benefits.text: A real person guides you from application to completion. No automated phone trees — just expert support when you need it.

benefits.title: Fast, Hassle-Free Approval
benefits.text: Quick online application with no credit impact until you decide to proceed. Most applicants receive a decision within hours.

stepsSection.intro: Five simple steps from application to your first swim.

steps.title: Apply Online
steps.text: Complete a quick application through Lyon Financial. It takes just a few minutes, and there's no credit impact unless you choose to move forward.

steps.title: Get Your Options
steps.text: A dedicated account manager reviews your qualifications and prepares personalized loan options tailored to your project and budget.

steps.title: Choose Your Plan
steps.text: Select from flexible programs with industry-leading rates. Pick the terms that work best for your family — from short-term to 30-year repayment.

steps.title: Build with Confidence
steps.text: Lyon Financial coordinates directly with Maxima Pools throughout your entire build. Funds are disbursed as milestones are completed.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool
steps.text: Dive in! Your backyard paradise is complete, and your financing is locked in at comfortable terms. No surprises — just relaxation.

faqs.q: Will applying affect my credit score?
faqs.a: No. The initial application is a soft inquiry that does not impact your credit. A hard inquiry only occurs if you decide to proceed with a loan.
Lyon Financial offers loans up to $250,000, covering pool installation, outdoor living, landscaping, and related improvements.
Your pool, patio, hardscaping, fencing, lighting, outdoor kitchen — essentially your entire backyard project can be rolled into one loan.
Most applicants receive a decision within hours of submitting their application. The entire process from application to funded project is streamlined for speed.

faqs.q: Do I need to be a homeowner?
faqs.a: Yes. Lyon Financial requires applicants to be homeowners with equity in their property. The pool must be installed at your primary or secondary residence.

finalCta.text: Apply online in minutes. No obligation, no credit impact until you decide to proceed. Your dream pool is closer than you think.
